components.name: FRVP
components.description: Fixed Range Volume Profile drawing — renders horizontal volume bars anchored to a time/price range on the chart. Two modes: anchor (single time point + manual price range) and range (two time points + auto price range from candles).
dependencies: useChartBars (live volume map accumulation from trade ticks)
DrawingsPrimitive (pane view registration, preview renderers, hover price relay)
notes: rightEdge = t2BitmapX ?? (anchorX + maxBarW) — key formula for all placement/POC logic; t2BitmapX is null in anchor mode
Three bar-drawing modes inside _drawBars: price (rowSizeMode='price' + rowSizePrice), count (numBars buckets), raw (one bar per tick level when numBars=0)
Volume map is a live Map<price, volume> accumulated from trade ticks in useChartBars; range mode filters it via computeRangeBounds()
Preview renderers (FRVPPreviewRenderer, FRVPRangePreviewRenderer) only draw dashed lines — no bar rendering, no placement logic needed
STORE_VERSION is auto-bumped by pre-commit hook (.git/hooks/pre-commit) whenever any file in frontend/src/store/ is staged — never bump manually
barPlacement ('left'|'right'|'middle') and barOffset (CSS px gap) are style settings; 'middle' starts bars at centerX and grows right — not mirrored
barLength (1–100%) scales maxBarW before _drawBars — controls max bar width as % of rectangle width; applied after range-mode capping
extendPoc=true spans the POC line across the full rectangle (anchorX → rightEdge) regardless of placement or offset
volumeType field is reserved for future delta/up-down volume; only 'total' is wired up — greyed out in UI
Expand animation uses _expandMap (price → current expand px) with EXPAND_LERP=0.25 lerp per frame; _requestUpdate triggers redraws

components.name: DrawingEditToolbar
components.description: Floating toolbar that appears when a drawing is selected. Shows type-specific controls: color, fill color, text, stroke width/style, hline extend/template, rect settings, FRVP input/style tabs. Multi-select shows count + delete only.
dependencies: FRVPToolbarPanel (FRVP-specific tab panel, lives in FRVP component)
notes: closeAll() resets every popover state — always call it before opening a new one
FRVP branch renders FRVPToolbarPanel (just a settings button); settings live in FRVPSettingsPopover modal
lineStyleDefs.ts is shared between StrokePopover and RectSettingsPopover — edit there, not inline
TextColorGrid was removed (was dead code — never rendered)

components.name: ColorPopover
components.description: Color picker popover with palette, custom colors, opacity slider. ColorSwatchButton renders a fixed portal anchored to the swatch button. Used by all drawing style controls.
notes: ColorSwatchButton computes portal position synchronously in onClick (not useEffect) to avoid stale position on first open
Position clamped: left = Math.min(r.left, window.innerWidth - 290 - 8) so picker never overflows right edge
mousemove listener active while open to reposition when parent modal is dragged (useDraggable)
useClickOutside uses capture phase (addEventListener 3rd arg = true) so modal stopPropagation doesn't block it

components.name: Dropdown
components.description: Shared dropdown styling conventions. No single shell component — dropdowns inline the container div. Standard style: bg --color-surface, SHADOW.LG, border --color-border, rounded-lg. Items: hover:bg-(--color-hover-row), active: bg --color-text + color --color-surface. CustomSelect covers option-list dropdowns; complex/multi-step dropdowns inline their own container.
notes: Container: bg-(--color-surface), SHADOW.LG, border border-(--color-border), rounded-lg
Item hover: hover:bg-(--color-hover-row)
Item active/selected: background var(--color-text), color var(--color-surface)
Toolbar buttons use hover:bg-(--color-border) — different from dropdown items, intentional
Camera screenshot dropdown (ChartToolbar) is intentionally styled differently: rounded-xl, SHADOW.XXL
CustomSelect default dropdownBg is --color-surface; active item color inverts to dropdownBg

components.name: Popover
components.description: Shared draggable modal popover shell. Handles drag (useDraggable), click-outside close (useClickOutside), stop propagation, fixed centered positioning, header with title + X button, and footer with Cancel/Ok buttons. Used by all settings modals.
notes: onCancel prop — cancel button handler; falls back to onClose if not provided
children render between the two hr dividers (after header, before footer) — bring your own body padding
onMouseDown stopPropagation on root div is required for drag to work without collapsing the popover
LockoutButton previously used Popover as a dropdown shell — now inlines its own div; Popover is modal-only

components.name: ChartSettingsModal
components.description: Full-screen settings modal for chart configuration. Sidebar with 4 categories (Bars, Canvas, Trading, Events). Inline drag logic (not useDraggable) with grab/grabbing cursor. Cancel snapshots settings on open and reverts on cancel. Escape key triggers cancel.
notes: Uses inline drag (dragging ref + dragOffset ref) instead of useDraggable — sets document.body.style.cursor grabbing on mousedown, clears on mouseup
snapshotRef captures settings on mount; handleCancel restores snapshot then closes
Category sidebar: 'bars' | 'canvas' | 'trading' | 'events'

components.name: SpinnerInput
components.description: Compact numeric input with hover-reveal up/down chevron arrows. Supports click (±step) and click-hold-drag (scrub up/down at 2px/step). Used across all style toolbars.
notes: Drag activates only after DRAG_THRESHOLD (3px) movement — quick clicks are never treated as drags
didDragRef suppresses onClick on the arrow buttons after a real drag to prevent double-step at release
ns-resize cursor and userSelect:none applied to document.body only while dragging; cleaned up on mouseup
valueRef tracks current value for drag start capture; avoids stale closure in mousemove handler
